programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Cheap Hair Day
programme.desc: Kelley saves money by insulating her entire house with plastic. Now, she's bringing her Pilates studio into the home to save $800 per month. Pelin cuts hair and costs at her salon and must find cheap bridal party products to trim her budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper
programme.desc: Jamie's entire garden is made up solely of silk flowers. Now, she aims to replace her whole lawn with artificial grass, to eliminate her landscaping bill. Justin tries to land a job in sales, where he promises to save his employer tons of dough.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens
programme.desc: The O'Briens refuse to buy anything new, and instead find ingenious ways of fixing their broken belongings. Aimee's total net worth is $5.3 million, but she refuses to spend more than $1,000 a month.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Home is Where the Cart Is
programme.desc: Flight attendant Steffanie takes her boyfriend to the Unclaimed Baggage Center in hopes of pushing their relationship to the next level. Professional doorman RJ Andrews has no fixed address but lives rent-free by house sitting 365 days a year.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry
programme.desc: Stephanie's cheap behaviour embarrasses her boyfriend, Patrick, who thinks they have plenty of money to spend.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate
programme.desc: Dumpster diver Kate takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multicultural Cooking
programme.desc: Guy digs into traditions from many cultures, including tortillas, tacos, Jewish deli food, and Puerto-Rican specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Chowfest
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's filling up on winner winner chicken dinners. In Baltimore, the local landmark dishes out wicked wings alongside a steak wrap. In Eugene, Oregon, a soul food joint has BBQ chicken on top of their signature burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat in the Middle
programme.desc: Guy is grabbing dishes stacked and stuffed with off-the-hook goodness. In Baltimore, he checks out the pasta bar rolling out delicious ravioli and topping things off with their killer clams.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hanging out at real-deal mom-and-pop spots. In Logan, Utah, a family-run Indian joint hooked up to a gas station with Dad dishin' out specialties from his homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoked, Grilled And Fried
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill and into the fryer.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin' In Beantown
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is in Beantown for an all-Boston smorgasbord. Just outside the city in Allston, two restaurants share an open kitchen but have completely different menus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef It Up
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's divin' into menus boasting the bomb beef.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh Fish and Funky Chicken
programme.desc: Guy is hitting the road for some outrageous seafood and tasty chicken. In Des Moines, Iowa, the trophy-winning barbecue joint is dishing out unique wings and an apple dumpling dessert.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Flavor
programme.desc: Guy travels the South to try the unique flavours and authentic favourites from the region.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wings 'n Things
programme.desc: Guy goes to a Mexican restaurant that tosses chicken wings with homemade adobo sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless
programme.desc: This trip Guy's rolling out for some timeless traditions, like spit-roasted lamb at a Greek joint in Massachusetts and Cajun crawfish boils in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers 'n More
programme.desc: Guy heads to California to a warehouse-turned-burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Family Style
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is taking a seat at some family restaurants. He stops at a sibling-run Vietnamese place in Utah serving authentic dishes using family recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tried and True
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a roadside shack in Kittery serving the same fried clam recipe since 1956. He also visits a go to burger spot in Washington, D.C., and an Italian joint that has been around for 45 years.

programme.desc: Guy's digging into some super sandwiches and savoury stew starting in Santa Fe.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hungry Man

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Goldberg Girls
programme.desc: Afraid she'll be all alone in her old age, Beverly attempts to bond with other moms to form their own group like the TV show 'The Golden Girls,' while Erica gets annoyed at Geoff's romantic gestures, almost causing them to break up.

programme.title: Roseanne: Snoop Davey Dave
programme.desc: There's a snitch in the Conner household. Upset over their recent breakup, David tattles on Darlene. And, to Roseanne's horror, she finds out that Darlene is experimenting with drugs.

programme.title: Roseanne: Girl Talk
programme.desc: When Jackie spills the news that Becky and Mark are having sexual problems, Roseanne steps in to solve their dilemma. The situation snowballs when the men realize that no subject is sacred when it comes to their gossiping wives!

programme.title: Roseanne: Sleeper
programme.desc: Which one of the married Conner women did David have a sexy dream about? There is a flurry of activity to figure out the 'who' and the 'why'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Skeleton in the Closet
programme.desc: It's Roseanne's favorite holiday, Halloween, and Leon's planning a 'gay' soiree at the diner. During the party, Roseanne is horrified to learn about a dark secret in Fred's past.

programme.title: Roseanne: Follow the Son
programme.desc: D.J. is growing up, and Roseanne is having trouble loosening the apron strings. Meanwhile, David is stunned to find that Darlene's planning to move in with her new boyfriend, Jimmy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Punch and Jimmy
programme.desc: After D.J. gets pushed around by the town bully, Dan steps in to teach him the basics of self-defense. Recently dumped by Darlene, David begins overcompensating by acting 'macho'.

programme.title: Roseanne: White Men Can't Kiss

programme.title: Roseanne: Thanksgiving '94
programme.desc: Nana Mary's introduces her new husband at Thanksgiving.. Roseanne and Dan anxiously await the results from her prenatal test and learn that something may be wrong with the baby.

programme.title: Roseanne: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Waiting for the prenatal test results leave Roseanne and Dan in a panic. Emotions run high as Roseanne mulls over her pregnancy options and consequently excludes Dan from any paternal involvement.

programme.title: Roseanne: Rear Window

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins
programme.desc: An elite team of specialists use an advanced data algorithm to pinpoint when and where to encounter Bigfoot. Armed with the latest technology, they are in a race against time as they search for the elusive beast in the unforgiving Oregon wilderness.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?
programme.desc: With one team member down, Russell and Mireya head back into the forest to hunt down their leads. Their intense investigation uncovers their first pieces of possible Bigfoot evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Bigfoot Moon Rising
programme.desc: After Russell records thermal imagery he's convinced is Bigfoot, Bryce hurries to have the footage analyzed by experts. The evidence is staggering. Mireya and Ronny have a terrifying experience when they realize they're not along in the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: It Knows We're Here
programme.desc: Mireya's darkest nightmare comes true. Russell investigates a possible Bigfoot underwater passageway. Bryce secures an airship to survey the final square miles for Bigfoot's heat signature.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Miami: Elsa Foretells a Storm

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Miami: Surrounded by Hot Water

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Miami: Healing Hole

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Bye, Felicia
programme.desc: Old rivalries rear their ugly head when Josh Flagg's teenage client falls for Josh Altman's multi-million-dollar listing in the Bird Streets, leading to the agents facing off at the negotiating table for the first time ever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Fuschia My Life!
programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2-million closet, but is left hung out to dry when his client refuses every offer. Josh Flagg takes an Internet mogul shopping for a fixer to flip into a multi-million-dollar masterpiece.

programme.desc: The gloves come off when Madison's easy beachfront sale is jeopardized by his client working with another agent. Meanwhile, Josh Flagg lands a historical party pad, and Josh Altman juggles two Santa Monica listings and struggles to keep them straight.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Montcalm and Carry On
programme.desc: Josh Altman is caught between his fiancée and his client in a deal that could result in triple commission. Josh Flagg refuses to give up as he struggles to attract a buyer for his historic hilltop listings. The Brits' partnership begins to unravel.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: An archer returns home from the Crusades to find his father murdered and his lands taken over. He vows revenge against the Sheriff of Nottingham while training a band of outlaws in Sherwood Forest.

programme.title: Movie: Sahara
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Dirk Pitt, who is searching for a lost Civil War battleship, and UN doctor Eva Rojas, who is investigating a deadly epidemic in Africa, race to prevent a ruthless dictator from causing an environmental catastrophe.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef's size is revealed as a mosaic of environments. However, scale isn't the only success of this micro world. The reef exists in nutrient poor waters, which on the face of it, is too poor to support all this life.

programme.title: Blue Planet Now: Wonders of the Reef
Blue Planet Now: Hammerheads and Humpbacks
Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Night Shift
programme.desc: A rookie cop struggles to resist temptation when he meets a beautiful exotic dancer while on shift. But he's keeping secrets not just from his sergeants but his new girlfriend too. And he'll stop at nothing to keep his double life secret.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Two married church volunteers put their faith and families on the line for an affair that leads to expulsion from their church and community.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Sex and the Married Man
programme.desc: A married man embarks on a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret from the police.

programme.title: Murder on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a sleepy Texas town, detectives must act fast before the killer can take another victim.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: The Boy From Bristol
programme.desc: When a friend of Aaron Hernandez is found dead near his home, investigators turn their gaze on the New England Patriot. At trial, a sensational family drama unfolds as Aaron fights for his life. Later, links to another brutal slaying emerge.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Facing charges for the murder of Odin Lloyd, Aaron Hernandez's once acclaimed star status is in free fall. The testimony of two sisters threatens to tear a family apart. The trial reaches a dramatic conclusion, but Aaron's troubles are far from over.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez: An ID Murder Mystery: Secrets and Demons
programme.desc: With Jose Baez by his side, Aaron's back in the courtroom facing startling new allegations. After the verdict, his life takes another violent turn. In an exclusive interview, Aaron's high school friend reveals long held secrets from their past.

programme.title: Murder on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a sleepy Texas town, detectives must act fast before the killer can take another victim.

programme.title: Dark Minds: Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: The discovery of a naked woman's body on Ocean Parkway in 2011 was just the beginning. How many women has the Long Island Serial Killer brutalized and murdered? The Dark Minds team is hot on the trial, looking for clues in order to stop this madman.

programme.title: Dark Minds: Road Paved in Murder
programme.desc: In Denver, CO, a serial killer is posing the naked bodies of young women by highways outside the city. At least four victims were left this way and there may be more. The Dark Minds team is looking for connections and clues in the Aurora County Murders.

programme.title: Death in the Bayou: The Jennings 8: A Town Divided
programme.desc: Tired of waiting for justice in the suspicious death of their sister, two women search for answers. Secrets and suspects emerge, leading to a shocking arrest. When more women are found and frustration with police builds, fears mount over a serial killer.

programme.title: Death in the Bayou: The Jennings 8: A Town Divided
programme.desc: Tired of waiting for justice in the suspicious death of their sister, two women search for answers. Secrets and suspects emerge, leading to a shocking arrest. When more women are found and frustration with police builds, fears mount over a serial killer.

programme.title: Death in the Bayou: The Jennings 8: The Devil's Playground
programme.desc: Anger in Jennings boils over as an eighth woman is found and police have no answers. A task force is created, but rumors of corruption build. Whitnei's sisters question her autopsy report, and hear an explosive allegation from a mysterious figure.

programme.title: Death in the Bayou: The Jennings 8: The Devil's Playground
programme.desc: Anger in Jennings boils over as an eighth woman is found and police have no answers. A task force is created, but rumors of corruption build. Whitnei's sisters question her autopsy report, and hear an explosive allegation from a mysterious figure.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Golden State Killer
programme.desc: In the 1970s a serial rapist is on the loose in northern California. And just as his reign of terror over the community wanes, police discover he isn't just a serial rapist, he's a serial murderer and he's been killing people all over California.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: In 2004, the small town of Craig, Alaska is shocked when police discover the charred body of beloved mother and wife Lauri Waterman. People have no idea who would want to kill her, until an unlikely witness reveals a sordid story of secrets and lies.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Magnificent Mediterranean Pool
programme.desc: This pool is so extraordinary it takes over a year to build. From a 60-foot pool and a 14-foot spa to a hand-carved Italian marble fountain, the kinds pull out all the stops to give a family a piece of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: They say everything's bigger in Texas, and the pools are no exception. The Pool Kings are facing a big backyard and even bigger expectations from their interior design client.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Tiers
programme.desc: A Texas couple building their dream home wants a pool with one-of-a-kind architecture that's also kid-friendly for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Angry Birds
programme.desc: The competitors fight to showcase their cupcakes at a party for the Angry Birds Space app.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity: Hit Me With Your Best Dish
programme.desc: Anne and Tyler immediately throw the celebrity recruits into their first challenge after they arrive. They must cook their signature dishes so the chefs can assess their skills, or lack thereof, in the kitchen.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity: Rolling in the Deep
programme.desc: Things get ugly when the recruits tackle monkfish.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity: Mother Dough
programme.desc: Boot Camp is transformed into Celebrity Game Night, and chefs Anne Burrell and Tyler Florence watch their teams go head-to-head in the kitchen playing multiple rounds of celebrity-driven food games.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity: Nutritious And Delicious
programme.desc: Chefs Anne Burrell and Tyler Florence gather the celebrity recruits to play a unique taste-and-describe game with delicious comfort foods.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity: A La Cuisine!
programme.desc: The oven mitts come off as the celebrity recruits fight for a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity: It's All For The Fans
programme.desc: The two remaining celebrities face their final challenge: cooking a restaurant-quality meal for chefs Rocco DiSpirito and Aarthi Sampath and Tony Award winner Cady Huffman.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Play With Your Food
programme.desc: Alfonso says it's okay to play with your food, especially these tasty treats! From super-sized Fatboy ice cream sandwiches to super-seasoned Wise Onion rings to playful Melville candy glitter mustache lollipops.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Love is in the Air
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro gets the lowdown on the sweet messages imprinted on Necco's classic Sweet Hearts and how the Perfect Bite packs so much flavor into their Caramelized Onion and Feta Pastry Kisses.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sticky Situation
programme.desc: The secrets behind Necco's Slapstix lollipops and Long Grove Confectionary's Toffee.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sugar and Spice
programme.desc: It's sugar and spice and everything nice as host Alfonso Ribeiro shows how Sriracha hot sauce and Tina's Chimichangas amp up the spice factor in their tasty treats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Global Goodies
programme.desc: The world gets a little smaller when host Alfonso Ribeiro shares the secrets behind globally-inspired goodies. See how Jarlsberg cheese gets its holes and why the Idaho Candy Company made a confection shaped like a potato.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Fixins
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Florida fanning the flames for something savory and something sweet. Roger heads to Hamaknockers Bar-B-Que in Crawfordville, where a young pitmaster pulls pork with a power tool!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in pig paradise, cooking up two whole hogs in two different styles.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swords and Spits
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking visits chefs using unusual tools over live fires. In Georgia, Roger meets Erik Niel, a chef that loves to break out of his butcher shop to cook outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Queens of 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger meets with two Southern ladies famous in the barbecue world. In Nashville, Roger has eyes only for the smoked ribs at Mary's Old Fashioned Pit Bar-B-Que.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oh My, Meat Pie
programme.desc: Alton Brown tells the tale of an ancestor's journey to the New World by way of a curious meat pie shop. He explores the origins and preparation of shepherd's pie and mincemeat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tamale Never Dies
programme.desc: Alton embarks on a historical and tasty exploration of tamales, which are quite possibly the original convenience food.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Shakshuka
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a deep dive on one of the most internet-famous dishes of the decade by way of a famous film from the 1940s. Along the way, Alton talks through preserved lemons and homemade harissa.

programme.title: Good Eats: Cubing Around
programme.desc: AB makes good use of the only meat capable of being knitted together.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talkin' Teddy/ Principal Interest
programme.desc: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's love at first sight.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Space Invaders
programme.desc: When Captain Man and Kid Danger find out that an astronaut from Swellview has been taken hostage aboard the Space Station, they use Schwoz's 'love shuttle' to blast off into space.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Swellview's Got Talent
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger wonder why talent show contestants keep losing consciousness, so they seek help from Charlotte and Schwoz.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Balloons of Doom
programme.desc: When Dr. Minyak takes the Man Fans hostage, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to find a way to rescue them without Dr. Minyak seeing them move.

programme.title: The Thundermans: A Hero Is Born
programme.desc: Phoebe and Cherry's friendship is put to the test when the Thunderman family gets some unexpected news and must prepare for the surprise. Meanwhile, Max goes with Dr. Colosso to accept a Villain of the Decade award.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Doubles Trouble
programme.desc: Phoebe signs up for a tennis tournament in order to win a membership at Link's family's country club. She enlists Max to use his powers to help her, but when he gets a taste for the country club life, her plans go awry.

programme.title: The Thundermans: It's Not What You Link
programme.desc: Phoebe comes up with a plan to help Max and Link become friends. When Link ends up spending more time with Max than her, Phoebe thinks her plan was too good.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Pet
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia come across an abandoned spaceship and inside encounter a horrible alien monster that wants to eat them.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Bad Guy/ The Troll
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia crash on an asteroid populated by outlaws, so Sylvia convinces Wander to act like a real bad guy to fit in.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Box/ The Hat
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia are asked to deliver a box, but Wander obsesses about what could be inside and struggles not to open it.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Hero/ The Birthday Boy
programme.desc: Wander sets out to fulfill his fairytale dreams of rescuing a princess/ Wander is determined to turn Commander Peepers' arena of doom into the ultimate party palace for Lord Hater's birthday.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Day/ The Night
programme.desc: Sylvia awakens to find Wander asleep and imprisoned on Hater’s ship, and must fight to escape while managing a sleeping Wander.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Party Animal/ The Toddler
programme.desc: Sylvia intervenes when Emperor Awesome's partying threatens to destroy a planet.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Epic Quest of Unfathomable Difficulty/ The Void
programme.desc: Wander forces Sylvia to go on the most mind blowingly epic quest ever in order to return a lost sock to its owner. When Wander and Sylvia enter a white void where anything is possible through imagination, Sylvia worries Wander may never want to leave.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Liar/ The Stray
programme.desc: Wander guides a family of cute aliens through the perils of an active volcano, but Sylvia must provide the optimism needed to overcome the challenge. Later, Wander and Sylvia meet a cute, helpless creature and try to help it, only to find out it's a trap.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Rider
programme.desc: When Sylvia's old partner, Rider, shows up, Wander wonders if the roguish Rider makes a better teammate for Sylvia than he does.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Greater Hater
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia's world is turned upside down with the arrival of a new villain that threatens Lord Hater's status as the Greatest in the Galaxy.

programme.title: Movie: Pokémon: The First Movie

programme.title: Movie: The Other Mother

programme.desc: Carolyn and Jo face losing their families because their hoarding is so extreme.

programme.desc: Stacey has two days to get rid of the 47 dogs and cats that have taken over her house, or she may lose both her daughter and her home. Roi has been evicted from his home, as there are too many dangerous hazards there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joanne/ Kristy
programme.desc: The trauma of dealing with Joanne's hoarding was so bad for her daughter that she developed post-traumatic stress disorder. After experiencing the horror of assault, Kristi began shopping to escape her pain.

programme.title: Hoarders: Roxann and Barbara
programme.desc: Roxann is a vibrant, beautiful 32-year old mother and former model who has successfully hidden her hoarding until now. She fears Child Protective Services will intervene if she doesn't clean up her hoarded home.

programme.title: The First 48: Ultimate Price

programme.title: The First 48: Down in Overtown/ Breaking Point

programme.title: The First 48: House of Pain/ Into the Night
programme.desc: A friendly house party turns into a double murder. Also, a hardworking father stops for a drink after work and is the victim of a robbery gone bad.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: After her moose video goes viral, Mary focuses full time on making Tirdy Works a viable business. Her partner Deb gives her an ultimatum: make the business profitable by the end of winter or quit.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cyber Buddies
programme.desc: Find out which bit involving a scandalous photograph didn't make the cut, and which Joker got fired twice in one summer. Plus, learn which challenge took all day and night to complete.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: The C-Team
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: After her moose video goes viral, Mary focuses full time on making Tirdy Works a viable business. Her partner Deb gives her an ultimatum: make the business profitable by the end of winter or quit.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: The C-Team
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 4
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 3
programme.desc: Out-of-control race-car drivers, an ice road idiot, a trucker who can't outrun a train, and a DUI detainee with a bladder control problem.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 5
programme.desc: 20 of the world's most moronic motorheads crash everything from golf carts to Segways to snowmobiles to Ferraris.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 6
programme.desc: 20 real-life video clips of dopes driving dangerously for your amusement, including a thief in a hijacked backhoe, a trucker using Flintstone-style technology, and an Amish buggy driver who couldn't care less about the rules of the road.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: I'm Sorry: Too Slow
programme.desc: When Amelia has questions about different types of families, Andrea looks to expose her to new role models. Then, suspecting that her brother is about to come out, Andrea tries to prepare her mother but is surprised by her reaction.

programme.title: I'm Sorry: Divorce Fantasy
programme.desc: Andrea pushes her divorced friend Jennifer back into dating so she can live vicariously through her, but ends up regretting their night out.

programme.title: I'm Sorry: Butt Bumpers
programme.desc: Andrea and Mike meet a new family they hope to befriend, but things become awkward during a playdate.

programme.title: I'm Sorry: Weekend Alone
programme.desc: With Mike away on business and Amelia at Andrea's mother's place, Andrea finds herself home alone for the first time in years.

programme.title: I'm Sorry: Off the Charts
programme.desc: Worried about getting older, Andrea and Mike check in on their fertility. Plus, Andrea confronts her father about his increasingly odd behavior.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Las Vegas: When You Got to Go, You Got to Go
programme.desc: Danny and Mike frantically search the city for Ed when he is kidnapped.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Sperm Whales and Spearmint Rhinos
programme.desc: Mike is reunited with his ex-girlfriend from college who has a strange request for him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Lie is Cast
programme.desc: Danny's generous act gets him into trouble with the police and Ed cleans up the mess.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from a beautiful former co-worker visits Ed whose mere presence puts everyone's lives in serious danger. Danny and Mike have to protect this woman with the mysterious background. Delinda and Nessa compete for a high roller's affection.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Can You See What I See?
programme.desc: Ed decides to shake things up at the casino by switching everyone's job positions around.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Ed has jury duty on Valentine's Day, but Jillian thinks he is purposely avoiding her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: To Protect and Serve Manicotti
programme.desc: Danny and Mike feverishly work to reclaim $100,000 stolen from the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: One Nation, Under Surveillance
programme.desc: An ex-Marine turned local politician is embroiled in a sordid scandal with a 16-year-old.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hit Me
programme.desc: When surveillance technology fails to catch a thief, Ed must rely on human ingenuity.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: A high-rolling vampire mysteriously shows up in Sam's room and tries to seduce her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Letters, Lawyer, and Loose Women
programme.desc: Mike agrees to help a hotel guest who has lost his wedding ring at a local brothel.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Magic Carpet Fred
programme.desc: A beguiling magician uses his skills to help Ed catch a slippery thief.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Centennial
programme.desc: The new owner of the Montecito will be making some changes to the personnel and property.

programme.title: Movie: Easy A
programme.desc: A high school student uses a rumour about losing her virginity to raise her social standing and make money.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Great Gear
programme.desc: Guy's grabbing grub cooked up with some great gear. In San Francisco, a place firin' up lights-out lamb and huge pork biscuits in some of the city's last remaining indoor smokers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef and Bratwurst
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' the road and diggin' into some serious meat. In Atlanta, a funky Asian spot putting out prime-time pork belly and wok-fried chicken. In Vancouver, an elevated diner dishing out duck pancakes and not-your-momma's meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D All Stars
programme.desc: In Georgetown, Texas, Guy hooks up with Matthew McConaughey at a massive diner serving up righteous ham and waffles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kid Rock's Detroit Tour
programme.desc: Guy's taking Kid Rock's lead on a tour through D-town!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's driving the Camaro all over the nation for some real deal eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Only Get It Here
programme.desc: Guy is on the hunt for funky flavours, starting in San Francisco at an Asian/American/Mexican fusion joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy is visiting places across the country and trying out their sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Made to Order
programme.desc: Guy discovers an Italian joint doing lobster ravioli with homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Gone Wild
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into some dishes like mama made, if she had a wild imagination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Guy explores restaurants that serve literally from the farm and the ocean to the table.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wings, Dogs and Claws
programme.desc: Guy checks out the best homemade cooking in the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: And the Kicker Is
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a restaurant in Columbia with homemade patties, a corner store in Buffalo serving everything with a side of homemade bread and a diner that's redefining scrapple in Berkeley.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cooking For Jeffrey: Big Breakfast Buffet
programme.desc: Ina Garten entertains her friends, Devon Fredericks and Eli Zabar. They're serious foodies, so the pressure's on as she creates a stunning easy buffet with a Potato Pancetta Frittata, Overnight Belgian Waffles.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Ladies Who Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay has the perfect brunch for all the lovely ladies in his life and yours. The light and flavorful menu includes cheesy Mushroom and Grits Quiche topped with a vibrant Kale Pesto, and Easy Almond Sticky Buns.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Jade And Giada Day
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis treats Jade to a special day of mother-daughter fun and a delicious dinner.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Celebrating Mothers, Daughters and Daughters-in-Law
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and her friend, Suzanne, have always shared the bond of being mothers of sons, but now they have an opportunity to join the mother-daughter club. Valerie prepares a meal for Suzanne and her daughter-in-law.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Almost Healthy
programme.desc: Ree is making almost healthy and totally fabulous versions of classics. There's everyone's favourite cheeseburger sliders with portobellos instead of buns, fantastic cauliflower fried rice, zucchini lasagna and almost-instant fast and fruity ice cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Meg's Getting Married
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing recipes and stories from an engagement fiesta she hosted for a family friend. She re-creates the Tex-Mex party menu by making out-of-this-world crispy cerveza battered fish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Mom Deliveries
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is honoring some of her favorite moms by making sweet deliveries. She starts with strawberry cheesecake brownies for her stepmom and a blood orange rosemary pound cake to pack up and mail to her mom, Gerre.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 4
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's four kids are pitching in to help their mom shoot a special homemade episode with easy quarantine recipes for Mother's Day. Easy steak frites, and for pasta fans and busy mothers everywhere, she makes stovetop chicken spaghetti.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Oh, Fry Goodness!
programme.desc: Molly is sharing her most epic fried masterpieces, nothing tastes better than crispy, crunchy deliciousness. Oh fry goodness!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: If Mama Ain't Happy ...
programme.desc: Valerie knows that taking care of herself makes her a better mom, so this Mother's Day, she's inviting over Angela Kinsey to relax and practice some self-care, which of course involves a decadent meal.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Light Low Country
programme.desc: Kardea is having two special guests over for dinner -- her mom and grandma! Since her grandma is watching what she eats, Kardea prepares a meal that's deliciously Southern without breaking the calorie counter.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sunday Supper
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has invited some of his best chef friends to the ranch to share their favorite homestyle recipes for an old-fashioned Sunday supper. Alex Guarnaschelli starts the meal off right with a pitcher of lemony negronis.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Family-Inspired Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are at home and sharing family-inspired recipes, then giving a shout-out to super-fan moms for Mother's Day. Jeff makes sausage and mini sweet peppers to deliver it to this mother and mother-in-law. Alex makes an asparagus quiche.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Knife
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Colin Quinn and the dashing Katie Lee bring two New York chefs to challenge Bobby. Alex Guarnaschelli's protégé Diane Vista-Wayne and Daniel Boulud's protégé Lauren Brown compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Had Style, They Had Food, They Were There!
programme.desc: Actress Fran Drescher joins Chopped's Scott Conant to beat Bobby Flay with style, food and flair. They're upping the ante by bringing in two fantastic pastry chefs, Jessica Scott and Shelby Sieg, who are ready to bake Bobby into a corner.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Chef Adrianne Calvo is bringing her Miami heat as she goes head-to-head with German native and top Pennsylvania chef Ben Thomas.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Power of Jane
programme.desc: Actress Jane Krakowski teams up with Chef Michael Symon to steal Bobby Flay's spotlight. They bring in no-nonsense chefs Attila Bollok from Los Angeles and Matthew Spinner from Cleveland to give Bobby an early curtain call.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Challah At Your Boy!
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Jay Pharoah plot and strategize on how to get Bobby Flay beat. Canadian chef Rene Rodriguez brings his south of the border flavors against the Italian fare of chef Michael Kramer.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rules are Meant to be Broken
programme.desc: 'Chopped' host Ted Allen and comedian Margaret Cho don't play by the rules when it comes to taking down Bobby Flay. To do their dirty work, they've brought in renegade chefs Diane DiMeo and Ian Russo to put culinary golden boy Bobby in his place.

programme.title: Roseanne: Scenes From a Barbecue
programme.desc: Roseanne's loveable Grandma Mary pays a visit for Mother's Day.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Make Me Over
