programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan drop Jake off at a friend's house and head out for some sibling bonding at the movies, but their night is ruined when Alan freaks out after convincing himself that Jake was too eager to spend the weekend away from him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Humiliation Is a Visual Medium
programme.desc: No one believes Charlie when he says that his relationship with Mia is getting serious, and everyone really thinks he's lost it when he confesses that they have been dating for more than a month and haven't consummated the relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Love Isn't Blind, It's Retarded
programme.desc: Charlie plans a romantic date with Mia in the hopes of finally consummating their relationship. Meanwhile, Alan starts dating Kandi, Charlie's most recent ex-girlfriend, who is half his age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Tongue Is Meat
programme.desc: Charlie can't keep pace with the healthy lifestyle that Mia has introduced to their relationship, so he sneaks cigars and beers in the garage. When Mia busts him for lying, Charlie has to figure out if he's just whipped or truly in love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser
programme.desc: Charlie boycotts an advertising awards banquet, having lost several years in a row to his cocky arch nemesis Archie. After devising a ploy to get him to attend, Alan, Evelyn and Jake accompany Charlie for support, until they get to know Archie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Spit-Covered Cobbler
programme.desc: When Kandi's old car breaks down, Alan ends up leasing her a new one. Charlie warns him to break things off with her, but when Alan spends his last dime on Kandi's root canal and can't pay Judith's alimony, Charlie is forced to cover for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Once With Aunt Sophie
programme.desc: When a cute girl from Jake's school invites him to a party, Charlie butts in on Alan's milestone moment with his son by offering his own words of wisdom on women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Arguments for the Quickie
programme.desc: When Charlie finds out that Mia is in town with her dance troupe, he opts not to see her and tries to convince Alan that he's over her. Charlie gets another surprise when Mia explains that she wants something personal from him, his sperm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Working for Caligula
programme.desc: Now that newlywed Alan has moved out, Charlie returns to his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?
programme.desc: Alan feels guilty when he learns that Charlie and Mia didn't tie the knot because she had wanted him and Jake to move out. Meanwhile, Charlie and his rock star neighbour don't get along.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Sea Is a Harsh Mistress
programme.desc: Charlie tries surfing in order to impress a beautiful girl, with disastrous results. He later tells Alan that when his life was hanging in the balance, their deceased father came to him and made a request that Charlie is reluctant to fulfill.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Reckless Abandonment
programme.desc: When Barb and Matthew both announce they're moving out and Ritchie leaves for science camp, Christine tries to prove to everyone, including herself, that she's capable of taking care of herself.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Honey, I Ran Over the Kid
programme.desc: Christine accuses Richard of bad parenting when Ritchie gets hurt at a skateboarding party. She soon surpasses him as the worse parent when her over-protectiveness backfires.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Too Close for Christine
programme.desc: Christine is initially flattered when another scatterbrained mother at Ritchie's school considers her a 'rock,' but quickly tires of the responsibility of being responsible.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Change of Heart/ Pants
programme.desc: Christine and Richard help Marly and Lindsay through labour, evoking memories of Ritchie's birth and renewing romantic feelings.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Hair
programme.desc: After one too many cheap shots on her by the mean moms at Ritchie's snotty private school, Christine decides to enrol him in public school, which is not as easy as she anticipated.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: He Ain't Heavy
programme.desc: In her attempt to help Matthew lose weight using her know-how as the owner of a gym, Christine finds herself unable to shed the extra pounds she's put on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Working at the Cow Wash
programme.desc: As summer arrives, the team hosts a carwash fundraiser to help the cows and donkeys receive medication. Dan goes on a covert mission to save KJ an injured goat kid, and a donkey called Mary Pete needs medical attention.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: House Fire Rescue
programme.desc: Chris experiences his first rescue and saves two goats called Hugo and Emmy who are in need of serious medical attention. Joey the calf returns after a series of surgeries, and Lola the kid goat is surprised with a prosthetic.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: Most of the wildlife in Maine consists of moose, bear and deer. However, on occasion exotic animals make their way into the state and the wardens need to be prepared for anything. This time Sergeant Spahr wrangles a Boa Constrictor.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Passing the Torch
programme.desc: Warden Blanchard shows a high school student there is no such thing as a boring day on the job. Warden LaFlamme is promoted to Corporal of Landowner Relations and passes the responsibilities of his district on to Warden Lounder.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hot on the Heels
programme.desc: The game wardens are on the lookout for over eager sportsmen trying to bend the rules as the season comes to close. One warden catches a Canadian posing as an American while others bring a fugitive to justice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fighting the Flood
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas intervenes when a black bear cub gets separated from its mother and wreaks havoc on a small community. As heavy rains cause rivers to flood, Officer Eric Fluette races to rescue a man whose canoe has flipped in the rapids.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out
programme.desc: When an out of state hunter appears to be lying about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate. Conservation Officers work with volunteers to recover the body of a missing hiker on Mt. Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Officer Eric Hannett and Officer Bill Boudreau chase down a likely deer poacher. Officer Glen Lucas makes a dangerous trek to the summit of Mt. Washington to rescue a stranded and injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bait and Switch

programme.desc: Kim is done having babies and they have to figure out a permanent birth control plan. She and Kroy decide that he should have a vasectomy. Lana gets the runaround when she's left alone in the house to take care of Kroy and Kim.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Spring Break Forever, Biermanns

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Goes Gaga

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Them and Us
programme.desc: Steve Backshall explores the relationship we have with insects and arthropods. Steve reveals how we couldn't live without them.

programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Hunting Ted Bundy
programme.desc: The hunt is on for notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. As he unleashes his trail of terror in the Pacific Northwest, investigators are coming closer to discovering the monster behind the murders, and putting him away for life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Hunting Ted Bundy
programme.desc: The hunt is on for notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. As he unleashes his trail of terror in the Pacific Northwest, investigators are coming closer to discovering the monster behind the murders, and putting him away for life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: In-Laws and Outlaws
programme.desc: A law professor gunned down in Tallahassee. Suspects arrested clear across the state one of them a reputed gang leader. And the question what was the connection? A tangled web of relationships and cash deposits place a family under the microscope.

programme.title: Betrayed: Final Curtain
programme.desc: From devoted mother, to passionate lover to larger-than-life stage actress, forty-year-old Pasinetta Prince plays many roles in her life and she relishes the spotlight. Until a personal betrayal draws the final curtain and ends her life.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: True Conviction: Death Undercover
programme.desc: Young mother Nancy Klinger goes missing after telling friends she's going undercover on a black market baby sting.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: When a high school sophomore is found brutally raped and murdered, the clock is ticking as Las Vegas Police hunt a monster.

programme.title: True Conviction: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A 59 year old grandmother is discovered beaten and stabbed to death in her home on Mother's Day.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Orphans
programme.desc: For these women blood isn't thicker than water. A teen sacrifices her family for an early inheritance; an obsession with Hollywood memorabilia leads a recluse to kill her parents; and a soccer mom's social status is more important than her mother's life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Bury Their Babies
programme.desc: A mother's impulse to love and protect her child is a sentiment hard-wired into the brain, but these deadly women go against the most primal and basic instinct to protect their young.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Pity
programme.desc: A mother who wants another baby is prepared to steal from the womb; a grandmother's outward devotion masks her sadistic nature.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lady of Blood
programme.desc: Lizzie Borden, American most infamous murderess. Born into a wealthy respected family, Lizzie was a quiet, Sunday school teacher - that is until she took an ax and hacked her stepmother and and father to death. Or did she?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mommy's Little Helpers
programme.desc: The mother-son relationship is a dynamic one, and these deadly women taught their sons to hate and kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mothers Who Kill
programme.desc: These stories will shock you and make you wonder what would drive a woman to murder her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Beyond Repair
programme.desc: Twenty-six year old blonde beauty, Leah Ward, brings sparkle back into the eyes of 40-year old divorcee and entrepreneur, Ejaz Ahmad. But when Ejaz disappears only months later, it's his young son who leads the path to a grisly discovery and murder.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future

programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Steaks: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show on 'budget' steaks with new ways of cooking his favourite: top sirloin steak. Then there's a close look at why we 'flip' meat and a new angle on the broiler.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Bird In The Pan: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this classic roast chicken episode with new flavours, new science and a strange new twist on 'broiling'.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. Wong

programme.title: Unique Eats: Americana
programme.desc: Classic American fare gets the royal treatment at these extraordinary spots. Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works and mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn are featured.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Italian
programme.desc: Classic Italian meets passion, authenticity and innovation at these noteworthy restaurants. Vetri has been called one of the best Italian restaurants in America, presenting simple, fresh, authentic Italian dishes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Cupcakes
programme.desc: We'll take you from coast to coast to taste the most unique cupcakes in the country. Indulge in artisanal cupcakes paired with beer and wine; stuff yourself with custard-filled cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: San Fran Sweet Treats
programme.desc: We found three San Francisco restaurants that stand out in this foodie paradise. At Craftsman & Wolves, chef William Werner's attention to detail creates edible works of art like the Caramel Cube Cake that is actually spray-painted.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Grown-up Goodies
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., an ice cream shop adds cocktails to the mix-ins. In Healdsberg, Calif., the area's bountiful produce finds its way into hyper-seasonal cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Portland Sweets
programme.desc: Portland is one city at the forefront of the food scene using local ingredients with a unique spin.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Garfield
programme.desc: Four incredible cake artists compete to have their creations at the center of a party celebrating everyone's favorite lasagna-obsessed cat.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Where's Waldo
programme.desc: Get ready for a globe-trotting adventure as Cake Wars takes on Where's Waldo. Four amazing bakers battle it out to have their cake creations at the center of a party celebrating Where's Waldo.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Orleans
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the Big Easy where the food and the culture are a mix of southern tradition and modern influence.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Six friends living in New York City try to navigate their way through life's ups and downs while finding support from each other.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Vince Takes a Bath
programme.desc: When Vince throws out his back, Joyce conveniently disappears, leaving Mike and Molly to care for him. Meanwhile, the newlyweds struggle to write personalized thank-you notes for their wedding presents.

programme.title: Mom: Flamingos and a Dance-Based Exercise Class
programme.desc: Bonnie and the ladies help Tammy prepare for her first date since getting out of prison. Also, in order to take the edge off, Christy revisits one of her old vices.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Laxative Tester, Horse Inseminator
programme.desc: Alan takes a job working for Evelyn and Charlie is forced to mend Chelsea and Jake's rocky relationship.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Masters of Illusion: Impossible Escapes
programme.desc: Magicians attempt seemingly impossible escapes both in the studio and in the field.

programme.title: Dynasty: My Hangover's Arrived
programme.desc: In the season finale, it's time for Fallon's surprise Bachelorette Party and things go exactly as one would expect in the world of Carrington.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
programme.desc: In order to prepare Joey for his big date, Rachel eagerly agrees to step out with him.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Chaperone
programme.desc: Kramer chaperones Jerry's date with a Miss America contestant and becomes her personal coach. Elaine tries to get a job at Doubleday and becomes Mr. Pitt's personal assistant. George decides the Yankees should change their uniforms to cotton.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: To Have and Withhold
programme.desc: Molly has writer's block and she might lose her big advance if she doesn't cure it fast.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mister Knifey-Hands
programme.desc: Despite Beverly's wishes, Jackie's parents allow Adam to watch 'A Nightmare on Elm Street' and a disagreement between the families ensues. But Beverly dreams of facing off with Freddy Krueger, which teaches her a lesson about her son's relationship.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie 'Spaceballs,' and Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big Opening
programme.desc: Max and Caroline host a grand opening celebration at their new cupcake shop and Max invites her former flames to show off her success.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Fall of the Roman
programme.desc: Jason has decided that it's the right time to introduce his daughter to his girlfriend.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Friending Library
programme.desc: The "Meet Outdoor Man" contest winner, Wayne, believes Mike's vlogs contain secret messages. Vanessa wants to make friends, and starts a lending library in her neighbourhood. Chuck adjusts to his new life now that his wife has taken a job in L.A.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Zula Nyala
programme.desc: Jack has an adventure with cheetahs, rhinos, dung beetles and the Nyala antelope in South Africa's Zululand, then he and his daughter are welcomes into a Zulu tribe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Smoky Mountain Rescue
programme.desc: Jack sees the dedication of caregivers in Tennessee's Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Mandrills of Gabon
programme.desc: Jack searches for the elusive mandrill deep in the rainforests of Gabon. Mandrills are the largest monkeys in the world and are only found in the equatorial rainforests of Africa.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Decorative Details
programme.desc: The kitchen gets a new teak island top, while the master bath gets a solid-surface vanity top. Kevin meets homeowner Heather Faulds and designer Christine Tuttle at Boston's Design Center. Tom builds a nook for the TV, and wallpaper is hung.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Love Conquers All
programme.desc: A Kid Conservationist visits with owls at a wildlife sanctuary. A woman is dedicated to helping dogs with special needs. Then, a vet visit and tips for your pet, and a boy and his dog forge a forever bond.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Penguin Chick Bot
programme.desc: Alie shows us an innovative Surf Park in the North Wales countryside, inflatable fish that swim through the air, 3D printed statues of people and pets, and the Penguin Chick Bot that is giving researchers a new view into the penguin world.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: A mismatched group of forest animals try to defend their home from the development company that wants to demolish the forest and put up new houses.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Ed's Ex Wife
programme.desc: Mike is shocked when he finds out Vanessa sided with Ed's ex-wife, Wanda, instead of with Ed after he divorced her.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mother Fracker
programme.desc: After Vanessa's complex presentation to Eve's class on career day about her work for an oil company, the class quickly turns on Vanessa and accuses her of destroying Mother Earth.

programme.title: Movie: Twins
programme.desc: Years after they were separated at birth, a genetically engineered fraternal twin goes to Hollywood to find his brother.

programme.title: Movie: The Fighting Temptations
programme.desc: A New York advertising executive travels to a small Southern town to collect an inheritance but finds he must create a gospel choir and lead it to success before he can collect.

programme.title: Movie: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: This spoof of patriotic action movies revolves around a team of oblivious paramilitary soldiers, whose high-tech headquarters resides within Mount Rushmore, fighting to keep the world safe from terrorists and activists.

programme.title: Movie: American Wedding
programme.desc: Jim's grandmother wants to see him walk down the aisle and as her health is deteriorating the gang scrambles to get to town for Jim and Michelle's wedding.

programme.title: Movie: Grandma's Boy
programme.desc: A 35-year-old man named Alex is forced to live with his grandmother after getting thrown out of his former place due to non-payment of rent.

programme.title: Movie: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A divorce lawyer meets his match when he falls for the gold-digger he defeated in court.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: In order to get next to a computer expert whose new discovery may place national security at risk, Malcolm Turner must once again impersonate his grandmother. He poses as the hacker's nanny, but things get complicated when he gets close to the family.

programme.title: Movie: Frankie and Johnny
programme.desc: An ex-con gets a job as a short-order cook in a diner and tries to win the heart of a waitress who no longer believes in love.

programme.title: Movie: Head Office
programme.desc: The son of a senator falls in love with a woman leading a crusade against his father.

programme.title: Movie: Underdog
programme.desc: After a botched science experiment endows a disgraced beagle with superpowers and the ability to speak, he fights crime in Capitol City.

programme.title: Movie: The Pacifier
programme.desc: Assigned to protect the children of an assassinated scientist, Shane Wolf is suddenly faced with two incompatible jobs: fighting evil while keeping house and protecting a family from enemies seeking a top-secret experiment.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Movie: Clockstoppers
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a high-tech watch that enables him to make time stand still.

programme.title: Movie: Long Shot
programme.desc: A free-spirited journalist bumps into his childhood crush, who happens to be running for the Presidency. She impulsively hires him as her speechwriter, and sparks begin to fly between the two childhood friends despite their very different lives.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVIII
programme.desc: For Pride Month, we highlight the stories of David Alviar, Jacob Cornish and Jordan Windle. Three athletes who have experienced personal journeys that have shaped their athletic careers.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity
programme.desc: Though Charlie despises his sharp-tongued, passive aggressive mother, he's strangely attracted to Lydia, an attractive, blonde high-end real estate agent, just like his mother. Unfortunately, the similarities don't end there.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Repeated Blows to His Unformed Head
programme.desc: When Berta brings her pregnant daughter, the one she thought would make something of herself, to Charlie's house to help clean, Alan gets to satisfy one of his secret fetishes. Meanwhile, Charlie ventures out of his familiar Malibu surroundings.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throws her a farewell party.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Other Ones
programme.desc: A look back at 10 years of 'Friends,' featuring clips about Phoebe, Chandler and the boys.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mother From Another Mudlick
programme.desc: Mike meets his Aunt Rosemary for the first time and is instantly smitten by her warmth and positive attitude, which is the polar opposite of his mother.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Fight to the Finish
programme.desc: Molly gets angry at Mike for not listening to her vent about writing with Peggy and they go their separate ways for a day.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pot-Smoking Monkey
programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Live Woman of Proven Fertility
programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.title: Mom: Estrogen and a Hearty Breakfast
programme.desc: Christy squares off against Luke's conservative parents, who are upset about Violet's pregnancy. Meanwhile, Bonnie is determined not to let menopause get the best of her.

programme.title: Mom: Big Sur and Strawberry Lube
programme.desc: Christy is nervous about going on a romantic weekend getaway with Adam. Meanwhile, Gabriel's wife suspects he is cheating and seeks comfort from Christy.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Other Ones
programme.desc: A look back at 10 years of 'Friends,' featuring clips about Ross, Rachel and the girls.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Dates a Student
programme.desc: Ross flirts with danger and risks losing his job when he dates one of his students.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Fridge
programme.desc: Monica and Phoebe compete to see who can find an escort for Rachel to a charity event.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.
programme.desc: Joey rehearses for a role as a detective who solves crimes with his robot partner.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It's Snow Big Deal
programme.desc: Highlights uproarious weather-related videos from local stations, broadcasters and more.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Snow Laughing Matter
programme.desc: A weathercast is interrupted by a rogue camera, a pig takes a bite out of a swimsuit model’s rump roast, and a camel tries to squeeze himself into a tourist’s compact car with them still in it.

programme.title: Wipeout: Night of the Living Big Balls
programme.desc: Twenty-four players, including a zombie killer, an ice queen and a foxy toxicologist, race through the Wipeout City filled with zombies.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Through 'Pathway to Victory,' Dr. Robert Jeffress spreads the good news of Jesus Christ to a lost and hurting people, confronts an ungodly culture with God's truth, and equips the saints to apply scripture to their everyday lives.

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Katherine Stewart
programme.desc: Katherine Stewart visits.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Elementary: Internal Audit
programme.desc: When a hedge fund manager - who was also running a Ponzi scheme - is murdered, Holmes and Watson must determine which of his clients is guilty. Also, Sherlock contemplates sponsoring a fellow recovering addict.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Fiddler
programme.desc: Murray becomes an overzealous stage parent when he learns Adam has no interest in the school production of 'Fiddler on the Roof.' Meanwhile, Beverly can't seem to keep from interfering with Erica's latest career plan.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Bohemian Rap City
programme.desc: Adam's obsession with toys is cause for concern for Beverly and Murray, and they try to distract him with a new hobby. Meanwhile, The Dropouts decide to audition for "Star Search," but their egos threaten the band's future.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Reach for Raphael
programme.desc: A print believed to be from Renaissance master Raphael comes into the shop. Then, Corey gets rocked when a 1970s Ibanez guitar is brought in. Later, Corey and Chum try to find out the contents of Rick's will.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: In order to get ahead at work, a young advertising executive pretends she's engaged. She must then convince a recent acquaintance to act the part during an important meeting with her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Amy Schumer: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Amy Schumer talks about her life before a live audience at New York's iconic Apollo Theater.

programme.title: We're Here
programme.desc: Small town residents participate in one-night drag performances.

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: A woman receives a life-changing text from her college boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: Gone Fishin'
programme.desc: Two buddies win a vacation and get involved with a con who ripped off his ex-wives.

programme.title: Movie: CB4
programme.desc: A group of middle-class boys take on tough personas in order to form a rap group.

programme.title: Movie: Almost Heroes
programme.desc: Two 19th-century explorers attempt to reach the Pacific Ocean before Lewis and Clark.

programme.title: Movie: Man of the House
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy tries everything to drive away his mother's new boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: A golden retriever narrates his life story and describes his bond with an aspiring race car driver.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie: Forget Paris
programme.desc: The story of a romance between an NBA referee and an American woman living in Paris.

programme.title: Movie: Overnight Delivery
programme.desc: Convinced of his girlfriend's infidelity, a man sends a much-regretted poison-pen letter.

programme.title: Movie: College
programme.desc: During an orientation visit at Fieldmont University, best friends Kevin, Carter and Morris fall in with one of the rowdiest fraternities on campus. As new recruits, they are subjected to endless humiliations and to the no-holds-barred college party scene.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.
